raw_title: Migrating a text agent to a voice assistant with Amazon Nova 2 Sonic
raw_content: In this post, we explore what it takes to migrate a traditional text agent into a conversational voice assistant using Amazon Nova 2 Sonic. We compare text and voice agent requirements, highlight design priorities for different use cases, break down agent architecture, and address common concerns like tools and sub-agents for reuse and system prompt adaptation. This post helps you navigate the migration process and avoid common pitfalls.
